testcase.name: test_attendance_update_triggers_broadcast

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 'attendance_updated' event, received: [] assert 'attendance_updated' in []

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_sse_realtime_sync.py:149: in test_attendance_update_triggers_broadcast assert "attendance_updated" in events_received, \ E AssertionError: Expected 'attendance_updated' event, received: [] E assert 'attendance_updated' in []

testcase.name: test_export_returns_versioned_json
